selectedSlice: Turn the Admin Command Center Needs Attention rows into real drill-downs only where the current workspace already has an exact destination.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap: functions/api/admin/dashboard.ts already surfaced missing-mentor, revision-loop, mentor-meeting, export-failure, and presentation-outline rows, but those items only carried actionSection while the shared renderNeedsAttention() helper only renders a real button when a preset-backed destination exists. The current workspace already proved exact destinations for Student Directory missing-mentors, Review Queue revision-requested, and Presentation outline-follow-up, so wiring those three rows was the safest bounded Global Admin batch while the mentor-meeting and export-failure rows stay summary-only.
candidateShortlist: Broader Global Admin route refresh across Audit, Students, Presentation, Programs, and Users & Access
Admin archive export failure exact destination
userFacingImprovement: Global Admins can now open the existing missing-mentor student list, revision Review Queue, and presentation outline-follow-up schedule directly from Admin Command Center Needs Attention, while mentor-meeting and export-failure rows stay explicitly summary-only until a more exact destination exists.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses existing Student Directory, Review Queue, and Presentation flows instead of adding a new route or wider query shape.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed.
Mentor-meeting and export-failure rows remain summary-only because the current workspace still lacks a more exact filtered destination.

validation.notes: Focused workspace syntax, workspace coverage, and dashboard-action verification passed before docs/state closeout. Final validation also passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded attention-row slice.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Admin archive export failure still lacks a more exact filtered destination than the current Archive / Exports section.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
nextRecommended: Continue the bounded Global Admin route refresh only where the current workspace can prove an exact destination; otherwise keep Admin mentor-meeting and export-failure attention rows summary-only and move to the next proven route-backed gap.
doNotRepeat: Do not remove the new Admin Command Center attention drill-downs while the existing Students, Review Queue, and Presentation destinations still back them.
Do not invent an Admin mentor-meeting or export-failure preset until a real exact destination exists.
Do not broaden Global Admin dashboard actions into site-admin or other role workspaces while this slice stays Global Admin-only.
